result.stdout:
Moedim.Mcp.Fabric - Microsoft Fabric Semantic Model MCP Server

Usage: Moedim.Mcp.Fabric [options]

Transport Mode Options:
  --stdio                    Use stdio transport (default)
  --http                     Use HTTP/SSE transport (stateless mode)

HTTP Mode Options:
  --port, -p <number>        Port number for HTTP server (default: 5000, range: 1-65535)
  --disable-https-redirect   Disable HTTPS redirection in production

Other Options:
  --help, -h                 Show this help message

Environment Variables:
  UseHttp=true              Enable HTTP transport (command-line --http takes precedence)
  PORT=<number>             Set HTTP port (command-line --port takes precedence)
  Fabric:WorkspaceId        Microsoft Fabric workspace ID (required)
  Fabric:DefaultDatasetId   Default dataset ID for queries (optional)

Examples:
  # Run in stdio mode (default)
  Moedim.Mcp.Fabric

  # Run in HTTP mode on default port 5000
  Moedim.Mcp.Fabric --http

  # Run in HTTP mode on custom port
  Moedim.Mcp.Fabric --http --port 8080

  # Run in HTTP mode with HTTPS redirection disabled
  Moedim.Mcp.Fabric --http --disable-https-redirect

  # Using environment variables
  UseHttp=true PORT=8080 Moedim.Mcp.Fabric

For more information, see QUICKSTART.md
